title: shorea seminis
intro: Shorea seminis, also known as the Semen Shoreae, is a plant species that produces seeds used in traditional medicine. The seeds of this plant have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Shorea seminis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and powdered, then used in capsule or tea form, or as an ingredient in traditional remedies such as tonics and decoctions.
